title: Wellness Week Starts Monday
summary: A week of campus wellness activities begins Monday with fitness sessions, lunch events, and mindfulness workshops.
body: Employees can join morning walks, stress-management workshops, and healthy lunch pop-ups throughout the week. Registration is available through the employee portal.

title: IT Upgrades Shared Printing Service
summary: The IT team completed printer queue upgrades to improve reliability across shared office devices.
body: The new print service rollout reduces stuck print jobs and improves campus printer availability. Employees may need to reconnect once after the update.

title: HR Launches New Learning Resources
summary: New onboarding and professional development resources are available this month in the learning hub.
body: The HR team added new onboarding guides, manager toolkits, and self-paced learning tracks for staff interested in leadership and communication training.
